allow: PowerShell($cmd = Get-Command npm -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cmd\) { Write-Output \("npm: " + $cmd.Source\) }; $np = Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($np\) { Write-Output \("node: " + $np.Source\) } else { Write-Output "node not on PATH" }; Write-Output "--- searching common locations ---"; @\("$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\nodejs\\node.exe","$env:APPDATA\\npm\\node.exe","$env:ProgramFiles\\nodejs\\npm.cmd"\) | ForEach-Object { if \(Test-Path $_\) { Write-Output \("FOUND: " + $_\) } })
